parameters.label: Repository folder
parameters.description: Optional repository root. If set, the agent workspace is created inside that repo at .openwork/agents/<agent-name-slug>.
parameters.contentTemplate:
- The project repository root is `{{value}}`.
- Use other paths only if the task requires it; ask first when avoidable.
parameters.emptyContentTemplate:
- Work in the current folder by default for commands and file operations.
- Use other paths only if the task requires it; ask first when avoidable.
